description: Stud center positions and bracket configurations for mounting brackets.
notes: stud_centers_* arrays hold RAW stud positions (no bracket-offset baked in).
tongue_length is the portion of the bracket routed into the shelf.

bracket_bom.description: Total bracket count by tongue length across all 25 shelves
bracket_bom.note: tongue_length is the portion routed into the shelf; base width varies by tongue length

4_inch.used_for: right wall (3 studs × 10 R-shelves) + back shelf corner brackets (2 × 4 B-shelves)

10_inch.used_for: back wall (3 studs × 4 B-shelves) + back shelf side brackets (2 × 4 B-shelves)

right_wall.description: Right/West wall (x=48), raw stud Y-positions from door.

left_wall.description: Left/East wall (x=0), raw stud Y-positions from door.

back_wall.description: Back/South wall (y=49), raw stud X-positions from left corner.

back_shelf_side_brackets.description: Side support brackets for back shelves, mounted to left/right walls. stud_y is the raw stud position; shifts forward by sign * (base_width/2 - screw_hole_inset) to clear back-wall bracket tongues.

back_shelf_corner_brackets.description: Corner brackets for back shelves, screwed into hidden corner studs. Bracket sits flush against back wall; bracket_y = back_wall_y - base_width/2 (independent of screw_hole_inset).
